commands_run: python3 -m py_compile tools/ops_init.py tools/ops_learn.py tools/ops_ready.py tools/ops_orient.py tools/ops_choose.py tools/ops_council.py tools/ops_arbiter.py tools/ops_slice.py tests/task_ops.py tests/task_run.py tests/task_enter.py
